mapper.sql: select w.id, w.workflow_code, w.workflow_name, w.description, w.definition, w.trigger_type, w.schedule_expression, w.step_count, w.enabled, w.site_id, w.category_id, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon, s.name as site_name from gb_workflow w left join gb_categories c on w.category_id = c.id left join gb_sites s on w.site_id = s.id
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_workflow
workflow_code, workflow_name, description, definition, trigger_type, schedule_expression, step_count, enabled, site_id, category_id, create_by, create_time,
#{workflowCode}, #{workflowName}, #{description}, #{definition}, #{triggerType}, #{scheduleExpression}, #{stepCount}, #{enabled}, #{siteId}, #{categoryId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_workflow where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.site_id, s.name as site_name, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.create_time FROM gb_site_workflow_relation r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id WHERE r.workflow_id = #{workflowId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_workflow_relation (site_id, workflow_id, relation_type, create_time) VALUES (#{siteId}, #{workflowId}, #{relationType}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = #{relationType}, update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO gb_site_workflow_relation (site_id, workflow_id, relation_type, create_time) VALUES
(#{siteId}, #{workflowId}, #{relationType}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gb_site_workflow_relation SET is_visible = #{isVisible}, update_time = NOW() WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND relation_type = 'include'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gb_site_workflow_relation WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND relation_type = 'exclude'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gb_site_workflow_relation (site_id, workflow_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_time) VALUES
(#{siteId}, #{workflowId}, 'exclude', '0', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT site_id FROM gb_site_workflow_relation WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND relation_type = 'exclude'
